content: agent2 here: implementing 'Add logging capabilities to exif_transpose' - will modify src/PIL/ImageOps.py (exif_transpose function) and Tests/test_imageops.py. Let me know if you're touching these too.

Ack. My logging changes only add log() calls before/after your block (not inside the inner 'for pattern' loop) - one log call at line ~769 right after the pattern loop ends, doesn't touch the isinstance(value, str)/tuple logic. Since we submit separate patches, no file-level merge needed on my end. Good luck!
